TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit FieldBuilder extends System.Reflection.FieldInfo
Public MustInherit Class FieldBuilder Inherits FieldInfo
public ref class FieldBuilder abstract : System::Reflection::FieldInfo
.class public auto ansi sealed beforefieldinit FieldBuilder extends System.Reflection.FieldInfo
Public NotInheritable Class FieldBuilder Inherits FieldInfo
public ref class FieldBuilder sealed : System::Reflection::FieldInfo

Docs.summary: Defines and represents a field. This class cannot be inherited.

remarks.format:
## Remarks Get an instance of `FieldBuilder` by calling <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.TypeBuilder.DefineField*>, <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.ModuleBuilder.DefineInitializedData*>, or <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.ModuleBuilder.DefineUninitializedData*>.
> [!NOTE] > The <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder.SetValue*> method is currently not supported. As a workaround, retrieve the <xref:System.Reflection.FieldInfo> by reflecting on the finished type and call <xref:System.Reflection.FieldInfo.SetValue*> to set the value of the field.
## Examples The following example illustrates the use of the `FieldBuilder` class.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Overview/FieldBuilder.cs"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Overview/FieldBuilder.vb":::

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Docs.remarks: This constructor is invoked by derived classes.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property Attributes As FieldAttributes
public: virtual property System::Reflection::FieldAttributes Attributes { System::Reflection::FieldAttributes get(); };

Docs.summary: Indicates the attributes of this field. This property is read-only.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The following code sample illustrates the use of `Attributes`.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Attributes/fieldbuilder_reflectedtype.cs" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Attributes/fieldbuilder_reflectedtype.vb" id="Snippet1":::

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property DeclaringType As Type
public: virtual property Type ^ DeclaringType { Type ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Indicates a reference to the object for the type that declares this field. This property is read-only.
Docs.value: A reference to the object for the type that declares this field.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property FieldHandle As RuntimeFieldHandle
public: virtual property RuntimeFieldHandle FieldHandle { RuntimeFieldHandle get(); };

Docs.summary: Indicates the internal metadata handle for this field. This property is read-only.
Docs.value: The internal metadata handle for this field.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property FieldType As Type
public: virtual property Type ^ FieldType { Type ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Indicates the object that represents the type of this field. This property is read-only.
Docs.value: The object that represents the type of this field.

Docs.summary: Returns the custom attributes defined for this field.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance object[] GetCustomAttributes(bool inherit) cil managed
Public Overrides Function GetCustomAttributes (inherit As Boolean) As Object()

Docs.param: Controls inheritance of custom attributes from base classes.
Docs.summary: Returns all the custom attributes defined for this field.
Docs.returns: An array of type representing all the custom attributes of the constructor represented by this instance.

MemberSignature.Value: public override object[] GetCustomAttributes (Type attributeType, bool inherit);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance object[] GetCustomAttributes(class System.Type attributeType, bool inherit) cil managed
Public Overrides Function GetCustomAttributes (attributeType As Type, inherit As Boolean) As Object()
public: override cli::array <System::Object ^> ^ GetCustomAttributes(Type ^ attributeType, bool inherit);

Docs.param: The custom attribute type.
Controls inheritance of custom attributes from base classes.
Docs.summary: Returns all the custom attributes defined for this field identified by the given type.
Docs.returns: An array of type representing all the custom attributes of the constructor represented by this instance.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance object GetValue(object obj) cil managed
Public Overrides Function GetValue (obj As Object) As Object

Docs.param: The object on which to access the field.
Docs.summary: Retrieves the value of the field supported by the given object.
Docs.returns: An containing the value of the field reflected by this instance.

remarks.format:
## Remarks If the field is `static`, the `obj` parameter is ignored. For non-static fields, `obj` should be an instance of a class that inherits or declares the field.
The return type of <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder.GetValue*> is <xref:System.Object>. For example, if the field holds a Boolean primitive value, an instance of <xref:System.Object> with the appropriate Boolean value is returned. Before returning the value, <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder.GetValue*> checks to see if the user has access permission.
Access restrictions are ignored for fully-trusted code. `Private` constructors, methods, fields, and properties can be accessed and invoked using Reflection whenever the code is fully-trusted.

MemberSignature.Value: public override bool IsDefined (Type attributeType, bool inherit);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance bool IsDefined(class System.Type attributeType, bool inherit) cil managed
Public Overrides Function IsDefined (attributeType As Type, inherit As Boolean) As Boolean
public: override bool IsDefined(Type ^ attributeType, bool inherit);

Docs.param: The type of the attribute.
Controls inheritance of custom attributes from base classes.
Docs.summary: Indicates whether an attribute having the specified type is defined on a field.
Docs.returns: if one or more instance of is defined on this field; otherwise, .
Docs.exception: This method is not currently supported. Retrieve the field using and call on the returned .

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property MetadataToken As Integer
public: virtual property int MetadataToken { int get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a token that identifies the current dynamic module in metadata.
Docs.value: An integer token that identifies the current module in metadata.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The tokens obtained using this property can be passed to the unmanaged Reflection API.
> [!NOTE] > Information about metadata tokens can be found in the Common Language Infrastructure (CLI) documentation, especially "Partition II: Metadata Definition and Semantics". For more information, see [ECMA 335 Common Language Infrastructure (CLI)](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-335/).

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property Module As Module
public: virtual property System::Reflection::Module ^ Module { System::Reflection::Module ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the module in which the type that contains this field is being defined.
Docs.value: A that represents the dynamic module in which this field is being defined.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property Name As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ Name { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Indicates the name of this field. This property is read-only.
Docs.value: A containing the name of this field.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The following code sample illustrates the use of `Name`.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Overview/FieldBuilder.cs"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Overview/FieldBuilder.vb":::

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property ReflectedType As Type
public: virtual property Type ^ ReflectedType { Type ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Indicates the reference to the object from which this object was obtained. This property is read-only.
Docs.value: A reference to the object from which this instance was obtained.

remarks.format:
## Remarks A <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder> object represents a field of a particular class. In order to obtain a <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder> object, the <xref:System.Type> object that represents the class that supports the field is queried. This property holds a reference to that <xref:System.Type> object.
The following code sample illustrates the use of `ReflectedType`.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Attributes/fieldbuilder_reflectedtype.cs" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/Attributes/fieldbuilder_reflectedtype.vb" id="Snippet1":::

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig instance void SetConstant(object defaultValue) cil managed

Docs.param: The new default value for this field.
Docs.summary: Sets the default value of this field.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`defaultValue` is restricted to the following types: `Boolean`, `SByte`, `Int16`, `Int32`, `Int64`, `Byte`, `UInt16`, `UInt32`, `UInt64`, `Single`, `Double`, `DateTime`, `Char`, `String`, and `Enum`. If the field type is a reference type, CLS compliance requires `defaultValue` to be `null`. However, `defaultValue` can be non-null for a reference type as long as the value can be assigned to that reference type. For example, an `Int32` value can be assigned to a field of type <xref:System.Object>. This is not CLS-compliant, but it can be useful in interop scenarios.

Docs.exception: The containing type has been created using .

The field is not one of the supported types.
-or-
The type of does not match the type of the field.
-or-
The field is of type or other reference type, is not , and the value cannot be assigned to the reference type.

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig newslot virtual instance void SetConstantCore(object defaultValue) cil managed
Protected MustOverride Sub SetConstantCore (defaultValue As Object)

Docs.param: The new default value for this field.
Docs.summary: When overridden in a derived class, sets the default value of this field.
Sets a custom attribute.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig instance void SetCustomAttribute(class System.Reflection.Emit.CustomAttributeBuilder customBuilder) cil managed

Docs.param: An instance of a helper class to define the custom attribute.
Docs.summary: Sets a custom attribute using a custom attribute builder.

remarks.format:
## Examples The following code sample illustrates the use of `SetCustomAttribute` in the context of <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder>, using a <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.CustomAttributeBuilder>.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/SetCustomAttribute/fieldbuilder_setcustomattributes.cs" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/SetCustomAttribute/fieldbuilder_setcustomattributes.vb" id="Snippet1":::

Docs.exception: The parent type of this field is complete.

MemberSignature.Value: public void SetCustomAttribute (System.Reflection.ConstructorInfo con, byte[] binaryAttribute);
.method public hidebysig instance void SetCustomAttribute(class System.Reflection.ConstructorInfo con, unsigned int8[] binaryAttribute) cil managed
Public Sub SetCustomAttribute (con As ConstructorInfo, binaryAttribute As Byte())

Docs.param: The constructor for the custom attribute.
A byte blob representing the attributes.
Docs.summary: Sets a custom attribute using a specified custom attribute blob.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
For information on how to format `binaryAttribute`, see the metadata specification in Partition II of the [Common Language Infrastructure (CLI) specification](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-335/).
## Examples The following code sample illustrates the use of `SetCustomAttribute` in the context of <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder>, using a byte blob.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/SetCustomAttribute/fieldbuilder_setcustomattributes.cs" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/SetCustomAttribute/fieldbuilder_setcustomattributes.vb" id="Snippet1":::

Docs.exception: The parent type of this field is complete.

MemberSignature.Value: protected abstract void SetCustomAttributeCore (System.Reflection.ConstructorInfo con, ReadOnlySpan<byte> binaryAttribute);
.method familyhidebysig newslot virtual instance void SetCustomAttributeCore(class System.Reflection.ConstructorInfo con, valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<unsigned int8> binaryAttribute) cil managed
Protected MustOverride Sub SetCustomAttributeCore (con As ConstructorInfo, binaryAttribute As ReadOnlySpan(Of Byte))
abstract member SetCustomAttributeCore : System.Reflection.ConstructorInfo * ReadOnlySpan<byte> -> unit
protected: abstract void SetCustomAttributeCore(System::Reflection::ConstructorInfo ^ con, ReadOnlySpan<System::Byte> binaryAttribute);

Docs.param: The constructor for the custom attribute.
A of bytes representing the attribute.
Docs.summary: When overridden in a derived class, sets a custom attribute on this assembly.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig instance void SetOffset(int32 iOffset) cil managed

Docs.param: The offset of the field within the type containing this field.
Docs.summary: Specifies the field layout.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The following code sample illustrates the use of `SetOffset`.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/SetMarshal/fieldbuilder_setoffset.cs" id="Snippet1"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Reflection.Emit/FieldBuilder/SetMarshal/fieldbuilder_setoffset.vb" id="Snippet1":::

Docs.exception: The containing type has been created using .

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig newslot virtual instance void SetOffsetCore(int32 iOffset) cil managed
Protected MustOverride Sub SetOffsetCore (iOffset As Integer)

Docs.param: The offset of the field within the type containing this field.
Docs.summary: When overridden in a derived class, specifies the field layout.

MemberSignature.Value: public override void SetValue (object? obj, object? val, System.Reflection.BindingFlags invokeAttr, System.Reflection.Binder? binder, System.Globalization.CultureInfo? culture);

.method public hidebysig virtual instance void SetValue(object obj, object val, valuetype System.Reflection.BindingFlags invokeAttr, class System.Reflection.Binder binder, class System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture) cil managed
Public Overrides Sub SetValue (obj As Object, val As Object, invokeAttr As BindingFlags, binder As Binder, culture As CultureInfo)
override this.SetValue : obj * obj * System.Reflection.BindingFlags * System.Reflection.Binder * System.Globalization.CultureInfo -> unit

public: override void SetValue(System::Object ^ obj, System::Object ^ val, System::Reflection::BindingFlags invokeAttr, System::Reflection::Binder ^ binder, System::Globalization::CultureInfo ^ culture);
public override void SetValue (object obj, object val, System.Reflection.BindingFlags invokeAttr, System.Reflection.Binder binder, System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture);

Docs.param: The object on which to access the field.
The value to assign to the field.
A member of that specifies the type of binding that is desired (for example, IBinder.CreateInstance, IBinder.ExactBinding).
A set of properties and enabling for binding, coercion of argument types, and invocation of members using reflection. If binder is null, then IBinder.DefaultBinding is used.
The software preferences of a particular culture.
Docs.summary: Sets the value of the field supported by the given object.

remarks.format:
## Remarks This method will assign the `val` parameter to the field reflected by this instance on <xref:System.Object> `obj`. If the field is static, `obj` will be ignored. For non-static fields, `obj` should be an instance of a class that inherits or declares the field.
The new value is passed as an <xref:System.Object>. For example, if the field's type is Boolean, an instance of <xref:System.Object> with the appropriate Boolean value is passed. Before setting the value, <xref:System.Reflection.Emit.FieldBuilder.SetValue*> checks to see if the user has access permission.
Access restrictions are ignored for fully-trusted code. `Private` constructors, methods, fields, and properties can be accessed and invoked using Reflection whenever the code is fully-trusted.
> [!NOTE] > This method is currently not supported. As a workaround, retrieve the <xref:System.Reflection.FieldInfo> by reflecting on the finished type and call <xref:System.Reflection.FieldInfo.SetValue*> to set the value of the field.
